refundCancellation.valueCandidate: Can I cancel Colossyan at any time?
refundCancellation.snippet: Can I cancel Colossyan at any time? Monthly plans can be canceled at any time. Although annual plans can also be canceled, please note they are paid upfront for the year, so you won’t be refunded for any unused months.
